heroTitle: Turn Your Restaurant Menu Into a Premium Digital Experience
heroSubtitle: Create interactive QR menus in minutes. Update prices instantly, showcase dishes with photos, and give customers a modern experience.
mockupUpdateSubtitle: Price changes sync in real time
mockupDishHint: Tap for ingredients, allergens, and chef notes
demoCopy: The embedded menu demonstrates the exact customer experience: browse categories, search dishes, open product details, and see how live updates feel on mobile.
featuresTitle: A Premium Toolkit For Modern Restaurants
featuresIntro: Every interaction is tuned to feel like a high-end SaaS product: clear, fast, and polished enough to convert restaurant owners.

features.interactiveDesc: Present dishes with polished layouts, rich visuals, and seamless category browsing on any device.
features.qrDesc: Create branded QR codes instantly and turn every table, flyer, or receipt into a menu entry point.
features.updatesDesc: Edit prices, availability, and specials from one dashboard and publish changes instantly.
features.analyticsDesc: Track scans, views, and conversions to understand what guests actually explore.
features.brandingDesc: Match your colors, logo, and tone of voice so the menu feels like a polished extension of your brand.
features.languagesDesc: Serve more guests with English, French, Arabic, and any language your restaurant needs.

analyticsIntro: See which dishes attract attention, when guests scan most often, and how your menu converts interest into action.
partnersIntro: Bring restaurants onto Bon Plan and earn recurring commission when they subscribe. It’s a clean, affiliate-style growth loop built for creators, agencies, and hospitality partners.
partnersFlowCopy: Transparent commissions and clean partner reporting
finalBadge: Ready to convert more scans into orders?
finalTitle: Ready To Modernize Your Restaurant Menu?
finalCopy: Launch a premium QR menu experience that feels fast, modern, and built for conversion.
finalCard1Copy: Built to drive menu scans and subscriptions.
finalCard2Copy: Subtle animations give the product a premium feel.
finalCard3Copy: Dark glass panels, gradients, and crisp typography.
pricingIntro: Everything you need to run your digital menu, with transparent pricing and referral rewards.
pricingPlanDesc: Everything included for one simple price.
pricingRefDesc: Were you referred by a partner?
pricingRefFeat3: 50 DT discount on your first year
pricingPartnerDesc: Earn commissions for every restaurant that joins through your referral code.
pricingPlanWaText: Hello, I would like to subscribe to Bon Plan for my restaurant.
